info.title: SchoolDigger API
info.description: K-12 school and district data for 120,000+ U.S. schools

get.summary: Returns a simple and quick list of schools for use in a client-typed autocomplete

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search term for autocomplete (e.g. 'Lincol') (required)

parameters.name: qSearchCityStateName
parameters.description: Extend the search term to include city and state (e.g. 'Lincoln el paso' matches Lincoln Middle School in El Paso) (optional)

parameters.name: st
parameters.description: Two character state (e.g. 'CA') (optional -- leave blank to search entire U.S.)

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: Search for schools at this level only. Valid values: 'Elementary', 'Middle', 'High', 'Alt', 'Private' (optional - leave blank to search for all schools)

parameters.name: districtID
parameters.description: Search within SchoolDigger District ID (optional. Pro, Enterprise, and Autocomplete Pro levels only.)

parameters.name: boxLatitudeNW
parameters.description: Search within a 'box' defined by (BoxLatitudeNW/BoxLongitudeNW) to (BoxLongitudeSE/BoxLatitudeSE) (optional. Pro, Enterprise, and Autocomplete Pro levels only.)

parameters.name: boxLongitudeNW
parameters.description: Search within a 'box' defined by (BoxLatitudeNW/BoxLongitudeNW) to (BoxLongitudeSE/BoxLatitudeSE) (optional. Pro, Enterprise, and Autocomplete Pro levels only.)

parameters.name: boxLatitudeSE
parameters.description: Search within a 'box' defined by (BoxLatitudeNW/BoxLongitudeNW) to (BoxLongitudeSE/BoxLatitudeSE) (optional. Pro, Enterprise, and Autocomplete Pro levels only.)

parameters.name: boxLongitudeSE
parameters.description: Search within a 'box' defined by (BoxLatitudeNW/BoxLongitudeNW) to (BoxLongitudeSE/BoxLatitudeSE) (optional. Pro, Enterprise, and Autocomplete Pro levels only.)

parameters.name: returnCount
parameters.description: Number of schools to return. Valid values: 1-20. (default: 10)

get.summary: Returns a simple and quick list of districts for use in a client-typed autocomplete

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search term for autocomplete (e.g. 'Lincol') (required)

parameters.name: st
parameters.description: Two character state (e.g. 'CA') (optional -- leave blank to search entire U.S.)

parameters.name: boxLatitudeNW
parameters.description: Search within a 'box' defined by (BoxLatitudeNW/BoxLongitudeNW) to (BoxLongitudeSE/BoxLatitudeSE) (optional. Pro, Enterprise API levels only.)

parameters.name: boxLongitudeNW
parameters.description: Search within a 'box' defined by (BoxLatitudeNW/BoxLongitudeNW) to (BoxLongitudeSE/BoxLatitudeSE) (optional. Pro, Enterprise API levels only.)

parameters.name: boxLatitudeSE
parameters.description: Search within a 'box' defined by (BoxLatitudeNW/BoxLongitudeNW) to (BoxLongitudeSE/BoxLatitudeSE) (optional. Pro, Enterprise API levels only.)

parameters.name: boxLongitudeSE
parameters.description: Search within a 'box' defined by (BoxLatitudeNW/BoxLongitudeNW) to (BoxLongitudeSE/BoxLatitudeSE) (optional. Pro, Enterprise API levels only.)

parameters.name: returnCount
parameters.description: Number of districts to return. Valid values: 1-20. (default: 10)

get.description: Search the SchoolDigger database for districts. You may use any combination of criteria as query parameters.

parameters.name: st
parameters.description: Two character state (e.g. 'CA') - required

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search term - note: will match district name or city (optional)

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: Search for districts in this city (optional)

parameters.name: zip
parameters.description: Search for districts in this 5-digit zip code (optional)

parameters.name: nearLatitude
parameters.description: Search for districts within (distanceMiles) of (nearLatitude)/(nearLongitude) (e.g. 44.982560) (optional) (Pro, Enterprise API levels only. Enterprise API level will flag districts that include lat/long in its attendance boundary.)

parameters.name: nearLongitude
parameters.description: Search for districts within (distanceMiles) of (nearLatitude)/(nearLongitude) (e.g. -124.289185) (optional) (Pro, Enterprise API levels only. Enterprise API level will flag districts that include lat/long in its attendance boundary.)

parameters.name: boundaryAddress
parameters.description: Full U.S. address: flag returned districts that include this address in its attendance boundary. Example: '123 Main St. AnyTown CA 90001' (optional) (Enterprise API level only)

parameters.name: distanceMiles
parameters.description: Search for districts within (distanceMiles) of (nearLatitude)/(nearLongitude) (Default 50 miles) (optional) (Pro, Enterprise API levels only)

parameters.name: isInBoundaryOnly
parameters.description: Return only the districts that include given location (nearLatitude/nearLongitude) or (boundaryAddress) in its attendance boundary (Enterprise API level only)

parameters.name: boxLatitudeNW
parameters.description: Search for districts within a 'box' defined by (BoxLatitudeNW/BoxLongitudeNW) to (BoxLongitudeSE/BoxLatitudeSE) (optional)

parameters.name: boxLongitudeNW
parameters.description: Search for districts within a 'box' defined by (BoxLatitudeNW/BoxLongitudeNW) to (BoxLongitudeSE/BoxLatitudeSE) (optional)

parameters.name: boxLatitudeSE
parameters.description: Search for districts within a 'box' defined by (BoxLatitudeNW/BoxLongitudeNW) to (BoxLongitudeSE/BoxLatitudeSE) (optional)

parameters.name: boxLongitudeSE
parameters.description: Search for districts within a 'box' defined by (BoxLatitudeNW/BoxLongitudeNW) to (BoxLongitudeSE/BoxLatitudeSE) (optional)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number to retrieve (optional, default: 1)

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: Number of districts to retrieve on a page (50 max) (optional, default: 10)

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort list. Values are: districtname, distance, rank. For descending order, precede with '-' i.e. -districtname (optional, default: districtname)

parameters.name: includeUnrankedDistrictsInRankSort
parameters.description: If sortBy is 'rank', this boolean determines if districts with no rank are included in the result (optional, default: false)

get.summary: Returns a detailed record for one district
get.description: Retrieve a single district record from the SchoolDigger database

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The 7 digit District ID (e.g. 0642150)

get.summary: Returns a SchoolDigger school ranking list

parameters.name: st
parameters.description: Two character state (e.g. 'CA')

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: The ranking year (leave blank for most recent year)

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: Level of ranking: 'Elementary', 'Middle', or 'High'

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number to retrieve (optional, default: 1)

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: Number of schools to retrieve on a page (50 max) (optional, default: 10)

get.summary: Returns a SchoolDigger district ranking list

parameters.name: st
parameters.description: Two character state (e.g. 'CA')

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: The ranking year (leave blank for most recent year)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number to retrieve (optional, default: 1)

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: Number of districts to retrieve on a page (50 max) (optional, default: 10)

get.description: Search the SchoolDigger database for schools. You may use any combination of criteria as query parameters.

parameters.name: st
parameters.description: Two character state (e.g. 'CA') - required

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search term - note: will match school name or city (optional)

parameters.name: qSearchSchoolNameOnly
parameters.description: For parameter 'q', only search school names instead of school and city (optional)

parameters.name: districtID
parameters.description: Search for schools within this district (7 digit district id) (optional)

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: Search for schools at this level. Valid values: 'Elementary', 'Middle', 'High', 'Alt', 'Public', 'Private' (optional). 'Public' returns all Elementary, Middle, High and Alternative schools

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: Search for schools in this city (optional)

parameters.name: zip
parameters.description: Search for schools in this 5-digit zip code (optional)

parameters.name: isMagnet
parameters.description: True = return only magnet schools, False = return only non-magnet schools (optional) (Pro, Enterprise API levels only)

parameters.name: isCharter
parameters.description: True = return only charter schools, False = return only non-charter schools (optional) (Pro, Enterprise API levels only)

parameters.name: isVirtual
parameters.description: True = return only virtual schools, False = return only non-virtual schools (optional) (Pro, Enterprise API levels only)

parameters.name: isTitleI
parameters.description: True = return only Title I schools, False = return only non-Title I schools (optional) (Pro, Enterprise API levels only)

parameters.name: isTitleISchoolwide
parameters.description: True = return only Title I school-wide schools, False = return only non-Title I school-wide schools (optional) (Pro, Enterprise API levels only)

parameters.name: nearLatitude
parameters.description: Search for schools within (distanceMiles) of (nearLatitude)/(nearLongitude) (e.g. 44.982560) (optional) (Pro, Enterprise API levels only.)

parameters.name: nearLongitude
parameters.description: Search for schools within (distanceMiles) of (nearLatitude)/(nearLongitude) (e.g. -124.289185) (optional) (Pro, Enterprise API levels only.)

parameters.name: nearAddress
parameters.description: Search for schools within (distanceMiles) of this address. Example: '123 Main St. AnyTown CA 90001' (optional) (Pro, Enterprise API level only) IMPORTANT NOTE: If you have the lat/long of the address, use nearLatitude and nearLongitude instead for much faster response times

parameters.name: distanceMiles
parameters.description: Search for schools within (distanceMiles) of (nearLatitude)/(nearLongitude) (Default 5 miles) (optional) (Pro, Enterprise API levels only)

parameters.name: boxLatitudeNW
parameters.description: Search for schools within a 'box' defined by (boxLatitudeNW/boxLongitudeNW) to (boxLongitudeSE/boxLatitudeSE) (optional)

parameters.name: boxLongitudeNW
parameters.description: Search for schools within a 'box' defined by (boxLatitudeNW/boxLongitudeNW) to (boxLongitudeSE/boxLatitudeSE) (optional)

parameters.name: boxLatitudeSE
parameters.description: Search for schools within a 'box' defined by (boxLatitudeNW/boxLongitudeNW) to (boxLongitudeSE/boxLatitudeSE) (optional)

parameters.name: boxLongitudeSE
parameters.description: Search for schools within a 'box' defined by (boxLatitudeNW/boxLongitudeNW) to (boxLongitudeSE/boxLatitudeSE) (optional)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number to retrieve (optional, default: 1)

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: Number of schools to retrieve on a page (50 max) (optional, default: 10)

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort list. Values are: schoolname, distance, rank. For descending order, precede with '-' i.e. -schoolname (optional, default: schoolname)

parameters.name: includeUnrankedSchoolsInRankSort
parameters.description: If sortBy is 'rank', this boolean determines if schools with no rank are included in the result (optional, default: false)

get.summary: Returns a detailed record for one school
get.description: Retrieve a school record from the SchoolDigger database

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The 12 digit School ID (e.g. 064215006903)

schoolMatches.description: List of the schools that match the query

schoolid.description: SchoolDigger School ID Number (12 digits). Use /schools/{schoolID} to retrieve the full school record

zip.description: School location zip code (Pro, Enterprise, and Autocomplete Pro levels only)

schoolLevel.description: The level of school (Elementary, Middle, High, Private, Alternative)

lowGrade.description: The low grade served by this school (PK = Prekindergarten, K = Kindergarten)  (Pro, Enterprise, and Autocomplete Pro levels only)

highGrade.description: The high grade served by this school  (Pro, Enterprise, and Autocomplete Pro levels only)

latitude.description: School location latitude (Pro, Enterprise, and Autocomplete Pro levels only)

longitude.description: School location longitude (Pro, Enterprise, and Autocomplete Pro levels only)

rank.description: Statewide rank of this School  (Pro, Enterprise, and Autocomplete Pro levels only)

rankOf.description: Count of schools ranked at this state/level (Pro, Enterprise, and Autocomplete Pro levels only)

rankStars.description: The number of stars SchoolDigger awarded in the ranking of the school (0-5, 5 is best) (Pro, Enterprise, and Autocomplete Pro levels only)

ncesPrivateSchoolID.description: The NCES ID of the school (private schools only)

districtMatches.description: List of the districts that match the query

districtid.description: SchoolDigger District ID Number (7 digits). Use /districts/{districtID} to retrieve the full district record

lowGrade.description: The low grade served by this district (PK = Prekindergarten, K = Kindergarten)

highGrade.description: The high grade served by this district

hasBoundary.description: States whether there is an attendance boundary available for this District

rankOf.description: Count of districts ranked at this state/level

rankStars.description: The number of stars SchoolDigger awarded in the ranking of the district (0-5, 5 is best)

numberOfDistricts.description: The total count of districts that match your query

numberOfPages.description: The total count of pages in your query list based on given per_page value

districtID.description: SchoolDigger District ID Number (7 digits). Use /districts/{districtID} to retrieve the entire district record

locationIsWithinBoundary.description: Indicates whether this school's boundary includes the specified location from nearLatitude/nearLongitude or boundaryAddress (Enterprise API level)

hasBoundary.description: Indicates that an attendance boundary is available for this district. (To retrieve, look up district with /districts/{id})

distance.description: Distance in miles from the nearLatitude/nearLongitude coordinates (only populated when proximity search parameters are provided)

isWithinBoundary.description: Indicates whether this district's boundary includes the specified location from nearLatitude/nearLongitude

lowGrade.description: The low grade served by this district (PK = Prekindergarten, K = Kindergarten)

highGrade.description: The high grade served by this district

numberTotalSchools.description: Count of schools in the district

numberPrimarySchools.description: Count of schools designated as primary schools

numberMiddleSchools.description: Count of schools designated as middle schools

numberHighSchools.description: Count of schools designated as high schools

numberAlternativeSchools.description: Count of schools designated as other/alternative schools

rankHistory.description: SchoolDigger yearly rank history of the district

street.description: Street address of the school or district (e.g. '18500 37th Avenue N.E.')

city.description: City where the school or district is located

zip4.description: ZIP+4 suffix (4 digits, may be empty)

cityURL.description: SchoolDigger URL for schools in this city

zipURL.description: SchoolDigger URL for schools in this zip code

countyName.description: County in which the school or district is located

countyURL.description: SchoolDigger URL for all schools in this county

rankOf.description: Count of district ranked in this state

rankStars.description: The number of stars SchoolDigger awarded in the ranking of the district (0-5, 5 is best)

rankStatewidePercentage.description: Percentile of this district's rank (e.g. this district performed better than (x)% of this state's districts)

rankScore.description: The rank score calculated by SchoolDigger (see https://www.schooldigger.com/aboutranking.aspx)

numberOfStudents.description: Number of students enrolled in the district

numberOfSpecialEdStudents.description: The number of students having a written Individualized Education Program (IEP) under the Individuals With Disabilities Education Act (IDEA)

numberOfEnglishLanguageLearnerStudents.description: The number of English language learner (ELL) students served in appropriate programs

numberOfTeachers.description: Number of full-time equivalent teachers employed by the district

numberOfTeachersPK.description: Number of full-time equivalent pre-kindergarten teachers employed by the district

numberOfTeachersK.description: Number of full-time equivalent kindergarten teachers employed by the district

numberOfTeachersElementary.description: Number of full-time equivalent elementary teachers employed by the district

numberOfTeachersSecondary.description: Number of full-time equivalent secondary teachers employed by the district

numberOfAids.description: Number of full-time equivalent instructional aids employed by the district

numberOfCoordsSupervisors.description: Number of full-time equivalent instructional coordinators/supervisors employed by the district

numberOfGuidanceElem.description: Number of full-time equivalent elementary guidance counselors employed by the district

numberOfGuidanceSecondary.description: Number of full-time equivalent secondary guidance counselors employed by the district

numberOfGuidanceTotal.description: Total number of full-time equivalent guidance counselors employed by the district

numberOfLibrarians.description: Number of full-time equivalent librarians/media specialists employed by the district

numberOfLibraryStaff.description: Number of full-time equivalent librarians/media support staff employed by the district

numberOfLEAAdministrators.description: Number of full-time equivalent LEA administrators employed by the district (LEA)

numberOfLEASupportStaff.description: Number of full-time equivalent LEA administrative support staff employed by the district (LEA)

numberOfSchoolAdministrators.description: Number of full-time equivalent school administrators employed by the district (LEA)

numberOfSchoolAdminSupportStaff.description: Number of full-time equivalent school administrative support staff employed by the district (LEA)

numberOfStudentSupportStaff.description: Number of full-time equivalent student support services staff employed by the district (LEA)

numberOfOtherSupportStaff.description: Number of full-time equivalent all other support staff employed by the district (LEA)

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the school or district address (WGS84 decimal degrees)

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the school or district address (WGS84 decimal degrees, negative for Western Hemisphere)

lowGrade.description: The low grade served by this district (PK = Prekindergarten, K = Kindergarten)

highGrade.description: The high grade served by this district

finance.description: Yearly per-student spending data. Array is sorted most recent year first. spendingPerStudent is available at Pro level; detailed federal/state/local and personnel/non-personnel breakdowns require Enterprise level.

graduationRates.description: 4-year adjusted cohort graduation rates at district and state levels (Pro and Enterprise API level only). Array is sorted most recent year first.

dropoutRates.description: Annual dropout rates at district and state levels (Pro and Enterprise API level only). Array is sorted most recent year first.

chronicAbsenteeismRates.description: Chronic absenteeism rates (students missing 15+ days) at district and state levels (Pro and Enterprise API level only). Array is sorted most recent year first. Data availability varies by state.

isWithinBoundary.description: Indicates whether this district's boundary includes the specified location from nearLatitude/nearLongitude

rankHistory.description: SchoolDigger yearly rank history for this district, sorted most recent year first. Districts are ranked statewide regardless of level.

districtYearlyDetails.description: Yearly enrollment and staffing details for this district. Array is sorted most recent year first. Includes detailed FTE staffing breakdowns by role (teachers by level, administrators, counselors, librarians, support staff).

testScores.description: Standardized test score results with district and state comparisons. Each entry represents one test/subject/grade/year combination. District-level records do not include schoolTestScore. Requires Pro or Enterprise API subscription.

polylineCollection.description: Collection of one or more Google Maps encoded polylines representing the attendance boundary. IMPORTANT: Polyline strings are JSON-encoded with escaped backslashes (double backslashes). You must unescape before passing to Google Maps decoding functions. Multiple polylines represent districts/schools with non-contiguous boundary areas.

polylines.description: Boundary as a WKT (Well-Known Text) MULTIPOLYGON string with explicit latitude/longitude vertices. Can be used directly with GIS software, PostGIS, or any system that accepts WKT geometry. Format: MULTIPOLYGON (((-122.27 47.77, ...)))

hasBoundary.description: States whether there is a boundary available

year.description: Fiscal school year using spring-year convention (e.g. 2024 = the 2023-2024 fiscal year).

spendingPerStudent.description: Total spending per student from all funds (Pro or Enterprise level only)

spendingFederalPersonnel.description: Spending per student for Personnel at the Federal Level (Enterprise level only)

spendingFederalNonPersonnel.description: Spending per student for Non-personnel at the Federal Level (Enterprise level only)

spendingStateLocalPersonnel.description: Spending per student for Personnel at the State and Local Level (Enterprise level only)

spendingStateLocalNonPersonnel.description: Spending per student for Non-personnel at the State and Local Level (Enterprise level only)

spendingPerStudentFederal.description: Spending per student at the Federal Level (Enterprise level only)

spendingPerStudentStateLocal.description: Spending per student at the State and Local Level (Enterprise level only)

year.description: School year using spring-year convention (e.g. 2025 = the 2024-2025 school year)

schoolGraduationRate.description: 4-Year Graduation Rate at the School Level (Pro or Enterprise level only)

districtGraduationRate.description: 4-Year Graduation Rate at the District Level (Pro or Enterprise level only)

stateGraduationRate.description: 4-Year Graduation Rate at the State Level (Pro or Enterprise level only)

year.description: School year using spring-year convention (e.g. 2025 = the 2024-2025 school year)

schoolDropoutRate.description: Dropout Rate at the School Level (Pro or Enterprise level only)

districtDropoutRate.description: Dropout Rate at the District Level (Pro or Enterprise level only)

stateDropoutRate.description: Dropout Rate at the State Level (Pro or Enterprise level only)

year.description: School year using spring-year convention (e.g. 2025 = the 2024-2025 school year)

schoolChronicAbsenteeismRate.description: ChronicAbsenteeism Rate at the School Level (Pro or Enterprise level only)

districtChronicAbsenteeismRate.description: ChronicAbsenteeism Rate at the District Level (Pro or Enterprise level only)

stateChronicAbsenteeismRate.description: ChronicAbsenteeism Rate at the State Level (Pro or Enterprise level only)

test.description: The name of the state-administered test

grade.description: Grade level for which this test score applies (e.g. '3', '5', '8', '10', 'HS')

tier1.description: Label for the lowest performance tier on this test (e.g. 'Below Basic', 'Level 1'). Tier labels are state-specific. Enterprise API level only.

tier2.description: Label for the second performance tier (e.g. 'Basic', 'Level 2'). Enterprise API level only.

tier3.description: Label for the third performance tier (e.g. 'Proficient', 'Level 3'). Enterprise API level only.

tier4.description: Label for the fourth performance tier (e.g. 'Advanced', 'Level 4'). Enterprise API level only.

tier5.description: Label for the fifth performance tier, if applicable (e.g. 'No Score'). Not all states use 5 tiers. Enterprise API level only.

polylineOverlayEncodedPoints.description: Google Maps encoded polyline string for rendering the boundary on a map. Compatible with google.maps.geometry.encoding.decodePath() and similar libraries. IMPORTANT: Backslashes are JSON-escaped (appear as \\). Unescape to single backslashes before decoding.

numberEncodedPoints.description: Number of encoded points in polyline

studentsEligible.description: Count of students eligible to take test

percentMetStandard.description: Percent of students meeting state standard

numberMetStandard.description: Count of students meeting state standard

numTier1.description: Count of students performing at tier 1 (Enterprise API level only)

numTier2.description: Count of students performing at tier 2 (Enterprise API level only)

numTier3.description: Count of students performing at tier 3 (Enterprise API level only)

numTier4.description: Count of students performing at tier 4 (Enterprise API level only)

numTier5.description: Count of students performing at tier 5 (Enterprise API level only)

percentTier1.description: Percent of students performing at tier 1 (Enterprise API level only)

percentTier2.description: Percent of students performing at tier 2 (Enterprise API level only)

percentTier3.description: Percent of students performing at tier 3 (Enterprise API level only)

percentTier4.description: Percent of students performing at tier 4 (Enterprise API level only)

percentTier5.description: Percent of students performing at tier 5 (Enterprise API level only)

rankYearsAvailable.description: The years for which SchoolDigger rankings are available for this state and level

numberOfSchools.description: The total count of schools in this ranking list

numberOfPages.description: The total count of pages this ranking list based on given per_page value

schoolList.description: The schools in the ranking list

APISchoolSummary21.description: APISchool2Summary: A summary of a school record. For the full school record, call /schools/{id}

urlCompare.description: SchoolDigger URL for comparing this school to nearby schools

distance.description: Distance from nearLatitude/nearLongitude, boundaryLatitude/boundaryLongitude, or boundaryAddress (if supplied)

locale.description: NCES urban-centric locale classification (e.g. 'City: Large', 'Suburb: Midsize', 'Rural: Fringe'). Categories: City (Large/Midsize/Small), Suburb (Large/Midsize/Small), Town (Fringe/Distant/Remote), Rural (Fringe/Distant/Remote). See https://nces.ed.gov/ccd/rural_locales.asp

lowGrade.description: The low grade served by this school (PK = Prekindergarten, K = Kindergarten)

highGrade.description: The high grade served by this school

schoolLevel.description: The level of school (Elementary, Middle, High, Private, Alternative)

isCharterSchool.description: Indicates if school is a charter school (Yes/No/n-a)

isMagnetSchool.description: Indicates if school is a magnet school (Yes/No/n-a)

isVirtualSchool.description: Indicates if school is a virtual school (Yes/No/n-a)

isTitleISchool.description: Indicates if school is a Title I school (Yes/No/n-a)

isTitleISchoolwideSchool.description: Indicates if a school-wide Title I school (Yes/No/n-a)

rankHistory.description: SchoolDigger yearly rank history of the school. To retrieve all years, call /schools/{id}.

rankMovement.description: Returns the movement of rank for this school between current and previous year

schoolYearlyDetails.description: School Yearly metrics. To retrieve all years, call /schools/{id}.

isPrivate.description: Indicates if school is a private school (Yes/No)

privateDays.description: Days in the school year (private schools only)

privateHours.description: Hours in the school day (private schools only)

privateHasLibrary.description: Indicates if the school has a library (private schools only)

privateOrientation.description: Affiliation of the school (private schools only)

districtID.description: The 7 digit SchoolDigger District id number

url.description: The URL to see the district details on SchoolDigger

rankURL.description: The URL to see the district in the SchoolDigger ranking list

rankOf.description: Count of schools ranked at this state/level

rankStars.description: The number of stars SchoolDigger awarded in the ranking of the school (0-5, 5 is best)

rankLevel.description: The level for which this school is ranked (Elementary, Middle, High)

rankStatewidePercentage.description: Percentile of this school's rank (e.g. this school performed better than (x)% of this state's elementary schools)

averageStandardScore.description: The Average Standard score calculated by SchoolDigger (see: https://www.schooldigger.com/aboutrankingmethodology.aspx)

numberOfStudents.description: Count of students attending the school

percentFreeDiscLunch.description: Percent of students receiving a free or discounted lunch in the National School Lunch Program

percentofAfricanAmericanStudents.description: Percentage of students who are Black or African American (NCES definition: a person having origins in any of the black racial groups of Africa)

percentofAsianStudents.description: Percentage of students who are Asian (NCES definition: a person having origins in any of the original peoples of the Far East, Southeast Asia, or the Indian subcontinent)

percentofHispanicStudents.description: Percentage of students who are Hispanic or Latino (NCES definition: a person of Cuban, Mexican, Puerto Rican, South or Central American, or other Spanish culture or origin, regardless of race)

percentofIndianStudents.description: Percentage of students who are American Indian or Alaska Native (NCES definition: a person having origins in any of the original peoples of North and South America who maintains tribal affiliation or community attachment)

percentofPacificIslanderStudents.description: Percentage of students who are Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander (NCES definition: a person having origins in any of the original peoples of Hawaii, Guam, Samoa, or other Pacific Islands)

percentofWhiteStudents.description: Percentage of students who are White (NCES definition: a person having origins in any of the original peoples of Europe, the Middle East, or North Africa)

percentofTwoOrMoreRaceStudents.description: Percentage of students reporting two or more races (not Hispanic/Latino)

percentofUnspecifiedRaceStudents.description: Percentage of students whose race/ethnicity was not specified or reported

teachersFulltime.description: Number of full-time equivalent teachers employed at the school

pupilTeacherRatio.description: Number of students / number of full-time equivalent teachers

numberofAfricanAmericanStudents.description: NCES definition: A person having origins in any of the black racial groups of Africa.  (https://nces.ed.gov/statprog/2002/std1_5.asp)

numberofAsianStudents.description: NCES definition: A person having origins in any of the original peoples of the Far East, Southeast Asia, or the Indian subcontinent, including, for example, Cambodia, China, India, Japan, Korea, Malaysia, Pakistan, the Philippine Islands, Thailand, and Vietnam.  (https://nces.ed.gov/statprog/2002/std1_5.asp)

numberofHispanicStudents.description: NCES definition: A person of Cuban, Mexican, Puerto Rican, South or Central American, or other Spanish culture or origin, regardless of race. (https://nces.ed.gov/statprog/2002/std1_5.asp)

numberofIndianStudents.description: Count of American Indian or Alaska Native students (NCES definition: a person having origins in any of the original peoples of North and South America who maintains tribal affiliation or community attachment)

numberofPacificIslanderStudents.description: NCES definition: A person having origins in any of the original peoples of Hawaii, Guam, Samoa, or other Pacific Islands. (https://nces.ed.gov/statprog/2002/std1_5.asp)

numberofWhiteStudents.description: NCES definition: A person having origins in any of the original peoples of Europe, the Middle East, or North Africa. (https://nces.ed.gov/statprog/2002/std1_5.asp)

numberofTwoOrMoreRaceStudents.description: NCES definition: Includes any combination of two or more races and not Hispanic/Latino ethnicity. (https://nces.ed.gov/statprog/2002/std1_5.asp)

numberofUnspecifiedRaceStudents.description: Count of students whose race/ethnicity was not specified or reported

rankYearsAvailable.description: The years for which SchoolDigger district rankings are available for this state

numberOfDistricts.description: The total count of districts in the entire rank list

numberOfPages.description: The total count of pages in your query list based on given per_page value

numberOfSchools.description: The total count of schools that match your query

numberOfPages.description: The total count of pages in your query list based on given per_page value

APISchoolSummary22.description: APISchool2Summary: A summary of a school record. For the full school record, call /schools/{id}

urlCompare.description: SchoolDigger URL for comparing this school to nearby schools

distance.description: Distance from nearLatitude/nearLongitude, boundaryLatitude/boundaryLongitude, or boundaryAddress (if supplied)

lowGrade.description: The low grade served by this school (PK = Prekindergarten, K = Kindergarten)

highGrade.description: The high grade served by this school

schoolLevel.description: The level of school (Elementary, Middle, High, Private, Alternative)

isCharterSchool.description: Indicates if school is a charter school (Yes/No/n-a)

isMagnetSchool.description: Indicates if school is a magnet school (Yes/No/n-a)

isVirtualSchool.description: Indicates if school is a virtual school (Yes/No/n-a)

isTitleISchool.description: Indicates if school is a Title I school (Yes/No/n-a)

isTitleISchoolwideSchool.description: Indicates if a school-wide Title I school (Yes/No/n-a)

rankHistory.description: SchoolDigger yearly rank history of the school. To retrieve all years, call /schools/{id}.

rankMovement.description: Returns the movement of rank for this school between current and previous year

schoolYearlyDetails.description: School Yearly metrics. To retrieve all years, call /schools/{id}.

isPrivate.description: Indicates if school is a private school (Yes/No)

privateDays.description: Days in the school year (private schools only)

privateHours.description: Hours in the school day (private schools only)

privateHasLibrary.description: Indicates if the school has a library (private schools only)

privateOrientation.description: Affiliation of the school (private schools only)

ncesPrivateSchoolID.description: The NCES ID of the school (private schools only)

url.description: URL of the school's own public website (may be null if not available). This is NOT the SchoolDigger page — see urlSchoolDigger for that.

urlCompareSchoolDigger.description: SchoolDigger URL for comparing this school to nearby schools

locale.description: NCES urban-centric locale classification (e.g. 'City: Large', 'Suburb: Midsize', 'Rural: Fringe'). Categories: City (Large/Midsize/Small), Suburb (Large/Midsize/Small), Town (Fringe/Distant/Remote), Rural (Fringe/Distant/Remote). See https://nces.ed.gov/ccd/rural_locales.asp

lowGrade.description: The low grade served by this school (PK = Prekindergarten, K = Kindergarten)

highGrade.description: The high grade served by this school

schoolLevel.description: The level of school (Elementary, Middle, High, Private, Alternative)

isCharterSchool.description: Indicates if school is a charter school (Yes/No/n-a)

isMagnetSchool.description: Indicates if school is a magnet school (Yes/No/n-a)

isVirtualSchool.description: Indicates if school is a virtual school (Yes/No/n-a)

isTitleISchool.description: Indicates if school is a Title I school (Yes/No/n-a)

isTitleISchoolwideSchool.description: Indicates if a school-wide Title I school (Yes/No/n-a)

isPrivate.description: Indicates if school is a private school (Yes/No)

privateDays.description: Days in the school year (private schools only)

privateHours.description: Hours in the school day (private schools only)

privateHasLibrary.description: Indicates if the school has a library (private schools only)

privateOrientation.description: Affiliation of the school (private schools only)

ncesPrivateSchoolID.description: The NCES ID of the school (private schools only)

reviews.description: User-submitted reviews from SchoolDigger.com visitors. Each review includes a star rating (1-5), comment text (HTML encoded), date, and reviewer type (parent, student, teacher, principal, citizen). Reviews are unmoderated user content.

finance.description: Yearly per-student spending data. Array is sorted most recent year first. spendingPerStudent is available at Pro level; detailed federal/state/local and personnel/non-personnel breakdowns require Enterprise level.

graduationRates.description: 4-year adjusted cohort graduation rates at school, district, and state levels (Pro and Enterprise API level only). Array is sorted most recent year first.

dropoutRates.description: Annual dropout rates at school, district, and state levels (Pro and Enterprise API level only). Array is sorted most recent year first.

chronicAbsenteeismRates.description: Chronic absenteeism rates (students missing 15+ days) at school, district, and state levels (Pro and Enterprise API level only). Array is sorted most recent year first. Data availability varies by state.

rankHistory.description: SchoolDigger yearly rank history for this school, sorted most recent year first. Schools are ranked within their state and level (Elementary, Middle, or High). Includes all available years — the full record returns more years than the summary in search results.

rankMovement.description: Returns the movement of rank for this school between current and previous year

testScores.description: Standardized test score results with school, district, and state comparisons. Each entry represents one test/subject/grade/year combination. Includes percent meeting standard and optional tier breakdowns (Enterprise level). Tests are state-specific (e.g. SBA, WCAS in WA; CAASPP in CA). Requires Pro or Enterprise API subscription.

schoolYearlyDetails.description: Yearly enrollment, demographics, and staffing for this school. Array is sorted most recent year first and includes all available years (back to 1988 for some schools). The full record returns more years than the summary in search results.

submitDate.description: The date the review was submitted, formatted as M/D/YYYY (e.g. '1/24/2009'). Note: single-digit months and days are not zero-padded.

comment.description: Free-text comment left by the reviewer. Content is HTML encoded (special characters escaped). May be empty string if reviewer only left a star rating.

submittedBy.description: Reviewer type (parent, student, teacher, principal, citizen)
